items.detail: 1529 total units in mission (threshold: 1200). Even late-activated units consume memory.
766 trigger zones (threshold: 90). Zones used in triggers are evaluated every frame.
CTLD detected in mission scripts. checkHoverStatus and checkAIStatus poll every 1–2s over all registered transport pilots — a steady CPU cost at scale.

5,879 non-blank lines of mission-specific Lua (frameworks excluded): footholdSyriaSetup.lua (3,584), WelcomeMessage_Syria_EXTENDED.lua (1,348), Hercules_Cargo.lua (656), Zeus.lua (154), noFlyZone.lua (58), Destroy STATIC SYRIA EXTENDED.lua (38), gm_bench.lua (32), Foothold_SY_MANTIS.lua (9). Threshold: warning >5,000, critical >15,000.
